query:
SELECT 
  pc.id as category_id,
  pc.name as category_name,
  COUNT(pq.id) as question_count
FROM position_categories pc
LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId
WHERE pc.positionId = 8
GROUP BY pc.id, pc.name
ORDER BY pc.id;
command:

  pc.name as category_name,

LEFT JOIN position_questions pq ON pc.id = pq.categoryId
